title: RBI Penalty on Bank of Baroda and GIC Housing Finance Ltd - Fair Practices Code and KYC Non-Compliance
description: <cite index="27-2,27-3,27-4">RBI imposed penalties totalling ₹66.70 lakh on Bank of Baroda and GIC Housing Finance Ltd for non-compliance with directions issued by the banking regulator. The highest penalty of ₹63.60 lakh was imposed on Bank of Baroda, while GIC Housing Finance was penalised ₹3.10 lakh.</cite> <cite index="27-6">Bank of Baroda was penalised for non-compliance with Fair Practices Code and KYC norms, with RBI's statutory inspection finding that Bank of Baroda had charged interest higher than the contracted rate in certain loan accounts.</cite>
